differential_diagnoses: Peptic ulcer disease with gastric outlet obstruction
next_steps: EGD (Esophagogastroduodenoscopy) to evaluate for peptic ulcer disease and gastric outlet obstruction
Gastric emptying study to rule out gastroparesis
Detailed review of cannabinoid use history and consideration of cessation trial
Measurement of serum lead levels due to history of pica
Review of abdominal CT imaging by an expert radiologist to assess for vascular compression syndromes like SMA syndrome
Initiate bowel rest and consider parenteral nutrition if vomiting persists
